title: Starry Night SMP
description: The vanilla-compatible fabric modpack used on the private Starry Night MP server.
body: This is the modpack as used in the private Starry Night SMP Vanilla-based Minecraft server. This modpack is shared publicly so that others may enjoy it as they please. Most of these mods are compatible with vanilla or bukkit based servers, but to get the best experience it is recommended you install all of their fabric mod counterparts on a fabric based server.
